one_time_description: Government of Canada forgave BC treaty negotiation loan advances effective March 31, 2020
economic_notes: Nation has interest in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing General Partner Inc. and Limited Partnership. Marble Canyon Forestry Ltd. is a government business enterprise accounted for on modified equity basis. Economically dependent on ISC and First Nations Health Authority funding.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 (not 2024). Prior year restated due to change in accounting for Replacement Reserve Fund and CMHC housing asset amortization - restated 2019 accumulated surplus was $13,211,925 vs previously stated $11,324,447. Government of Canada forgave $2,505,693 in treaty negotiation loan advances. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. Consolidated subsidiaries include Operating Fund, Social Housing Fund, Capital Fund, Ottawa Trust Fund, Enterprise Fund (0436158 B.C. Ltd. and Ts'kw'aylaxw Forest Co. Ltd.). Marble Canyon Forestry Ltd. accounted for on modified equity basis as GBE. expenses_housing combines Housing ($104,853) and Social Housing ($139,934). No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($2,857,991) + Province of BC ($687,501) + CMHC ($78,337) + First Nations Health Authority ($701,362) = $4,325,191 but FNHA may be considered a health transfer; conservative estimate used. annual_debt_service reflects only long-term debt repayments per cash flow statement.
